name: loan-intelligence-parser

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:mobile && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21" && set "ANDROID_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "GRADLE_USER_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\.gradle" && set "PATH=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21\bin;D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk\platform-tools;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:install: npm run android:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21" && set "ANDROID_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "GRADLE_USER_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\.gradle" && set "PATH=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21\bin;D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk\platform-tools;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat installDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21" && set "ANDROID_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "GRADLE_USER_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\.gradle" && set "PATH=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21\bin;D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk\platform-tools;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:bundle: npm run android:sync && cd android && set "JAVA_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21" && set "ANDROID_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk" && set "GRADLE_USER_HOME=D:\AndroidDev\.gradle" && set "PATH=D:\AndroidDev\jdk-21\bin;D:\AndroidDev\android-sdk\platform-tools;%PATH%" && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build

description: 助贷征信解析专家 - LoanIntelligence Parser
